snippet.desc: Loop music when the scene is loaded.
snippet.description: Loop music when the scene is loaded.
snippet.name: Background Music

number.desc: The channel at which to play the music. Must be between 0 and 31 inclusive.
number.name: _Channel

boolean.desc: If selected, the sound on the selected channel will be stopped before the music starts.
boolean.name: _StopChannelFirst

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

snippet.desc: Allows the actor to move up, down, left and right as well as in diagonal directions.
snippet.description: Allows the actor to move up, down, left and right as well as in diagonal directions.
snippet.name: 8 Way Movement

boolean.desc:
If selected, the actor will move in diagonal directions at the same speed as in axis-aligned directions.
If unselected, the actor will move in diagonal direction at a speed that is the sum of the axis-aligned velocities.
boolean.name: _NormalizeDiagonalSpeed

boolean.desc: If selected, the actor will not be able to turn while moving.
boolean.name: _StopTurningWhileMoving

boolean.desc:
If selected, the control attributes will be used to control the movement.
If unselected, the control attributes are ignored and the movement can be controlled by triggering custom events.
Trigger the events MoveUp, MoveDown, MoveLeft or MoveRight to make the actor move as if the keys were pressed.
boolean.name: _UseControls

boolean.desc: If selected, the animation attributes will be used, otherwise they will be ignored.
boolean.name: _UseAnimations

boolean.desc: If selected and moving in a diagonal direction, the Up and Down animations will be used, otherwise the Left and Right animations will be used.
boolean.name: _PreferVerticalAnimtations

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

snippet.desc: Allows the actor to move up, down, left and right as well as in diagonal directions.
snippet.description: Allows the actor to move up, down, left and right as well as in diagonal directions.
snippet.name: New 8 Way Movement

boolean.desc:
If selected, the actor will move in diagonal directions at the same speed as in axis-aligned directions.
If unselected, the actor will move in diagonal direction at a speed that is the sum of the axis-aligned velocities.
boolean.name: _NormalizeDiagonalSpeed

boolean.desc: If selected, the actor will not be able to turn while moving.
boolean.name: _StopTurningWhileMoving

boolean.desc:
If selected, the control attributes will be used to control the movement.
If unselected, the control attributes are ignored and the movement can be controlled by triggering custom events.
Trigger the events MoveUp, MoveDown, MoveLeft or MoveRight to make the actor move as if the keys were pressed.
boolean.name: _UseControls

boolean.desc: If selected, the animation attributes will be used, otherwise they will be ignored.
boolean.name: _UseAnimations

boolean.desc: If selected and moving in a diagonal direction, the Up and Down animations will be used, otherwise the Left and Right animations will be used.
boolean.name: _PreferVerticalAnimtations

snippet.desc: Allows the actor to simulate even when off screen.
snippet.description: Allows the actor to simulate even when off screen.
snippet.name: Always Simulate

event.displayName: Actor - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-actortotype

snippet.desc: Pause when the game loses focus and optionally dim the screen while the game is paused.
snippet.description: Pause when the game loses focus and optionally dim the screen while the game is paused.
snippet.name: Pause On Losing Focus

control.desc: A key to pause/unpause the game.
control.name: _PauseControl

boolean.desc: Dim the screen when the game is paused.
boolean.name: _DimScreen

number.desc: The opacity used for dimming the screen.
number.name: _DimmingOpacity

color.desc: The color used for dimming the screen.
color.name: _DimmingColor

text.desc: This text is drawn at the center of the screen while the game is paused. Leave empty if no text should be drawn.
text.name: _PausedText

font.desc: The font used for the drawing the <var>Paused Text</var>.
font.name: _Font

snippet.desc: Loop music when the scene is loaded.
snippet.description: Loop music when the scene is loaded.
snippet.name: New Background Music

number.desc: The channel at which to play the music. Must be between 0 and 31 inclusive.
number.name: _Channel

boolean.desc: If selected, the sound on the selected channel will be stopped before the music starts.
boolean.name: _StopChannelFirst

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

event.displayName: Type - Type Copy Copy Copy Copy Copy
event.name: event-collide-typetotype

snippet.desc: Pause when the game loses focus and optionally dim the screen while the game is paused.
snippet.description: Pause when the game loses focus and optionally dim the screen while the game is paused.
snippet.name: New Pause On Losing Focus

control.desc: A key to pause/unpause the game.
control.name: _PauseControl

boolean.desc: Dim the screen when the game is paused.
boolean.name: _DimScreen

number.desc: The opacity used for dimming the screen.
number.name: _DimmingOpacity

color.desc: The color used for dimming the screen.
color.name: _DimmingColor

text.desc: This text is drawn at the center of the screen while the game is paused. Leave empty if no text should be drawn.
text.name: _PausedText

font.desc: The font used for the drawing the <var>Paused Text</var>.
font.name: _Font
